name: llmroute-assistant
description: A local, agentic AI coding assistant powered by your llmroute gateway (Ollama). Chats, reads your code, proposes edits, and runs commands with your approval.

llmrouter.gatewayUrl.description: Base URL of the running llmroute gateway.

llmrouter.model.description: Model to request. 'auto' lets the router decide the tier.

llmrouter.agentModel.description: Model used for the agent loop. Empty = use the gateway's large tier (recommended for reliable tool use). 'auto' = let the router decide (cheaper, weaker at tool following). Or a specific model tag.

llmrouter.maxSteps.description: Maximum agent tool steps per user turn.

llmrouter.autoApproveReadTools.description: Auto-run read-only tools (read_file, list_dir). Edits and commands always ask.
